name: 6 Shelf Hanging Closet Organizer Tan - Brightroom™
description:
Keep shoes, socks, underwear and more effortlessly organized in your closet with the 6-Shelf Hanging Closet Organizer from Brightroom™. Made from fabric in a neutral tan hue, this hanging organizer has six shelves and comes pre-assembled. The organizer is great for use in any closet space and has hooks for easy hanging.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
